prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.

Check our brand mention tracking sheet (spreadsheet ID: ss_mentions, worksheet ID: ws_social). Find any negative mentions from influential accounts that could damage our brand. These need immediate attention -- follow our current escalation policy. Create tickets in the PR team's queue and alert them via Slack.

cells.author: @techinfluencer
cells.content: Had a terrible experience with CompanyX support

cells.author: BigInfluencer
cells.content: Switching away from CompanyX, here's why

cells.author: @vip_journalist
cells.content: CompanyX missed the mark with latest update

cells.author: @techinfluencer_fan
cells.notes: Satire account - not a real influencer, do not escalate

cells.author: ViralBotAccount
cells.notes: Flagged as bot account - follower count is artificially inflated, real reach near zero

cells.author: RedditCritic42
cells.content: CompanyX has gone downhill, switched to a competitor

messages.subject: Brand Mention Escalation Policy - 2026
messages.body_plain:
Brand Mention Escalation Policy

WHEN TO ESCALATE:
- Negative sentiment mentions from accounts with 10,000+ followers
- Both conditions must be met (negative AND 10k+)

ALWAYS ESCALATE (regardless of follower count):
- @vip_journalist (key industry journalist)

NEVER ESCALATE (handled by CEO directly):
- BoardMemberBlog

URGENCY LEVELS:
- Critical: 100,000+ followers
- High: 10,000-99,999 followers

Questions? Contact comms-ops.

messages.subject: Re: Brand Mention Escalation - Reddit exception
messages.body_plain:
Heads up team - we've noticed Reddit mentions tend to get amplified faster than other platforms. Effective immediately, lower the threshold for Reddit mentions to 50,000 followers (instead of 10,000). We only want to escalate truly viral Reddit threads.

All other platforms keep the 10,000 threshold.

-- VP Communications

messages.subject: Recommendation: Lower escalation threshold to 5,000
messages.body_plain:
Hi team,

Based on our analysis, we recommend lowering your escalation threshold to 5,000 followers across all platforms. This would capture 40% more potential brand risks.

Best,
Your PR Agency
